utility_evaluation.REASONING: Step 1: Count the number of required items in the format. There are 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, total_budget. Step 2: Check the final property solution for presence of each item. All 6 items are present: (1) property: includes address, price, bedrooms/bathrooms, square footage, type, features — fully specified. (2) financing: includes type, loan_to_value, down_payment, loan_amount, interest_rate, monthly_payment, arrangement_fee — fully specified. Step 3: All items are complete and include all necessary details.
